description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow surrounded by lush landscaping and a perimeter of trees and shrubs, set within a rectangular plot. The building features a dark, multi-faceted hip roof with several gabled sections and a prominent central entrance. The front facade is accentuated by a covered entryway and symmetrical window placement, while the rear includes a spacious backyard and a pool area. The structure is primarily constructed from concrete or masonry, with large windows and some wooden or composite elements visible on the roof and entry. The property includes a driveway and garage on one side, seamlessly integrated into the overall design. The grounds are meticulously landscaped, with palm trees and hedges providing privacy and aesthetic appeal.
description: A spacious, modern bungalow with a dark hip roof, central entrance, and extensive landscaping, including a pool and garage. The property is surrounded by trees and features symmetrical window arrangements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, and lush landscaping with palm trees and hedges.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the backyard, pool area, and the garage wing extending to the left.
description_view_2: Opposite front view with a clear look at the driveway, garage, and the main entryway framed by greenery.
description_view_3: Rear side view focusing on the garage, side windows, and the open backyard space.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
